sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23331" key="daktulo/pous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δακτῠλό-πους</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ποδος</itype>, <sense id="n23331.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">first phalanx,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δ. ἢ ῥιζοδάκτυλος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.238.25</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
